titleStmt.title: SII 40.272: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 272. (A.R. No. B. 317 of 1933.) Nārṇepāḍu, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a broken Nandi pillar opposite to the temple of Bhīmēśvarasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1073, Uttarāyaṇa Saṅkrānti.

Records the construction of the tank Drōnasamudra and gifted lands (under the cultivation of the tank) for providing offerings to the god Sōmēśvara Mahādēva of Nārāyaṇapāḍu and to the brahmapuris, for the merit of the king by Mandāḍi Kommana-Peggaḍa of the village, who belongs to the Śrivatsa-gōtra and calls himself the lord of Origāṇḍipura. Further it records the gift of land for conducting worship to the god Kēśavadēva of Nārayaṇapāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī nārāyaṇapāṭi śrī sōmēśvara mahādēvara
ku śrīmanu mahāmaṁḍalēśvara mahādēvara
cōḍagoṁkkarājulaku dharmmātthamugā svasti śrī
sakavarṣaṁbulu 1073 nēṁṭi yuttarāya
ṇa saṁkrāṁtti numityamuna yōrigoṁḍipura
varādhīśvaruṇḍunu śrīvatsagōtruṇḍunu gōtra pavi
truṇḍununaina nārāyaṇapāṭi maṁdaḍi kommana pre
ggaḍayūri tūrppunaṁḍḍama kaṭṭiṁccina dorasamudramani E
ḍiceṟama dēvaraku nivēdyārtthamu brahmapurulaku
rājulaku dharmmamugā niccitimi yūri paścimadi
kkuna polamuna guḍisthānāpati kētajiyyalakuṁ beṭṭi
kha 3 naṭṭavula mādena kha 7 maddaliya saṁki kha 3 yākari
nāme kha 3 saṁkkukēta kha 1 na 10 muppari sānikāṭama
kha 4 sāniyēṟiya ma kha 3 sānimuttama kha 3 sānimāra
ma kha 3 sānināgama kha 3 sāniprōlama kha 3 sānikosānama
kha 3 sāni Akkama kha 3 sāni gaṁgga ma kha 3 sāni kētama kha 3
va
śrīnārāyaṇapāṭi śrī kēśavadēvaraku nivēdyamuna
kēśamanikiṁ beṭṭina kha 1 .
ku beṭṭina kha 3
dēvara brahmāpurulaku rājulaku dharmmumagā bramma
dēvabhaṭṭa kha 3 tūrkkadēvabhaṭṭōpādhyāyala kha 3 māce
nabhaṭṭa kha 2 vēngibhaṭṭa kha 3 pinatūrkkadēva ṣaḍaṁggavula kha 3
rēmanabhaṭṭa kha 2 vēngibhaṭṭa kha 3 pinatūrkkadēvaṣaḍaṁggavu
la kha 3 jōsya nāgadēvabhaṭṭa kha 3 nallaṁgommanabhaṭṭa kha 2 nā
manabhaṭṭa kha 1
bahubhirvvasudhādattā bahubhiśvānupālitā yasyaya
sya yadābhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . svadattaṁ parada
ttaṁ vā yō harēta vasundarā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimi . I dharmmuvu Evvarēni vilōmamusē
sinavāru gaṁggakaṟtaṁnaṁgavilala vadhīṁccinavāru vāraṇā
śi vraccinavāru peddakoḍuku kapālamunaṁ guḍi
cinavāru . madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpativaṁśajāvāpā
pādapētamanasō bhuvibhāvi bhūpāye pālayantu ma
madharmmamiṁda samastaṁ tēṣāṁ mmayā viracitāṁ
jatimūddiki kīrasvakaḥ kārātu gōsa
hasravadasmitaḥ karapravrittiviccādādgokoṭiṣalama
mnita . māṣamātraṁ sudansāsyamāmēradyarddhama
ggulaṁ hāratini narakamāpnōti yāvadābhūtasaṁplavaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 40.272 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
